method: Claude reading all 111 skills in conversation context and producing judgments per the eval/scorers/skill_factcheck.py rubric. No API calls.

skills.title: Marketing Analytics Coursework
skills.reason: Generic title but Kelley School has extensive marketing analytics coursework; no school-specific name but the category absolutely exists.

skills.title: IU Marketing Analytics Club
skills.reason: School-attributed via 'IU'. Marketing-focused student orgs exist at Kelley; specific 'Marketing Analytics Club' I can't verify but plausible.

skills.title: Digital Marketing Certification
skills.reason: Generic — no specific certification named. Multiple legit options (Google, HubSpot, etc.) exist.

skills.title: Kelley School of Business Internship
skills.reason: Kelley IS IU's business school. Internship program well-established.

skills.title: Advertising and Brand Management Minor
skills.reason: Kelley has marketing concentrations; exact name 'Advertising and Brand Management Minor' I can't verify but the category exists.

skills.title: IU Professional Sales Program
skills.reason: Kelley's Professional Sales major/program is well-known and real.

skills.title: Purdue's Co-op Program
skills.reason: Purdue's Professional Practice (co-op) Program is real and well-known.

skills.title: ME 477: Engineering Economics
skills.reason: Course code format right for Purdue. Engineering Economics is more commonly an IE course (IE 343) at Purdue, not ME 477. Possible mis-attribution between departments.

skills.title: Purdue Undergraduate Research
skills.reason: Purdue has OUR (Office of Undergraduate Research); category is real.

skills.title: ME 483: Mechatronics
skills.reason: Purdue ME has mechatronics coursework. Exact course number ME 483 I can't verify.

skills.title: Purdue Formula SAE Team
skills.reason: Purdue Formula SAE is a long-established student org.

skills.title: Professional Certificate in Project Management
skills.reason: Generic — could refer to PMI's PMP, a Purdue cert, or many others. No school attribution.

skills.title: UCLA Financial Aid Office Workshops
skills.reason: Generic category, UCLA has Financial Wellness Program — close fit.

skills.title: Psychology Department Undergraduate Research Assistantships
skills.reason: UCLA Psych is one of largest in US; RAs are standard.

skills.title: UCLA Career Center Financial Literacy Seminars
skills.reason: UCLA Career Center is real. Financial literacy specifically may be via Financial Wellness Program rather than Career Center.

skills.title: UCLA Psychology Club
skills.reason: UCLA Psi Chi (psych honor society) and undergrad psych clubs exist.

skills.title: Psychology Department Internship Program
skills.reason: Standard offering.

skills.title: UCLA Counseling and Psychotherapy Volunteer Work
skills.reason: UCLA Counseling and Psychological Services (CAPS) exists; volunteer programs in related areas exist but exact phrasing is loose.

skills.title: UCLA School of Medicine Clinical Research
skills.reason: David Geffen School of Medicine at UCLA exists; clinical research opportunities exist but 'School of Medicine Clinical Research' as a named program isn't quite right — David Geffen is the proper name.

skills.title: UCLA Psychology Minor in Sociology
skills.reason: Incoherent program name. You can't have a 'Psychology Minor in Sociology' — those are two separate disciplines. UCLA has Psychology and Sociology as separate majors/minors; this conflation is wrong.

skills.title: UCLA Professional Certificate in Addiction Studies
skills.reason: UCLA Extension does offer addiction-related certificates; exact name varies.

skills.reason: Kelley has business education programs that include financial literacy; this exact name plausible.

skills.reason: Kelley has the IU Investment Banking Workshop and an Investment Management club exists; this exact name plausible.

skills.reason: Generic course title; Kelley has multiple business analytics courses.

skills.reason: Kelley has AI-related courses and minors; a formal 'AI Certificate' may exist but I can't verify the exact name.

skills.reason: Community colleges don't generally grant 'minors' — they grant associate degrees or certificates. Credential-type error.

skills.title: 6.034 Artificial Intelligence
skills.reason: Verified — MIT 6.034 IS 'Artificial Intelligence.' Real course (legacy course number).

skills.title: 6.824 Distributed Systems
skills.reason: Verified — MIT 6.824 IS 'Distributed Systems.' Famous course.

skills.title: 6.830 Machine Learning
skills.reason: Wrong course content. MIT 6.830 is 'Database Systems' (legacy numbering), not Machine Learning. ML at MIT is typically 6.036 or 6.867. Course number exists; content attribution is wrong.
